item.title: In 2025 and early 2026, the total value of tokenized gold grew from $1.1B to over $6B But how much of that growth came from capital moving onchain? And how much came from price increases? Our new Flow
item.description: pIn 2025 and early 2026, the total value of tokenized gold grew from $1.1B to over $6Bbr /br /But how much of that growth came from capital moving onchain? And how much came from price increases?br /br /Our new Flow vs Price charts on RWAs break down exactly this (pictured here for XAUT)./pimg src="

item.description: pThe economy remains healthy, but rising leverage has left the market increasingly fragile.br /br /With growth holding up and recession risk still low, our cyclical macro regime remains firmly risk-on.
